name: wildhaven-ceo
description: Public-facing CEO twin of Wildhaven AI Homes. The brand's executive voice in public, pre-founding. Authenticated collaborators with read access to kody-w/wildhaven-ceo pull richer context (board minutes, strategy docs, IP roadmap) at runtime; anonymous visitors get the public manifesto voice. Bundles standard memory cartridges.
_note: CEO seat-as-twin. Pairs with the brand-voice wildhaven-ai-homes-twin variant. Private companion: kody-w/wildhaven-ceo.
